items.claim: Jacobe Smith is a very good wrestler.
items.quote: The guy is a very good wrestler

items.claim: Kevin Holland has struggled significantly against wrestlers throughout his UFC career.
items.quote: we've seen Holland struggle so much with wrestlers throughout his UFC career.

items.claim: Kevin Holland's struggles with wrestlers are more pronounced at 185 pounds.
items.quote: Holland particularly is struggling more so with wrestlers at 185 lbs.

items.claim: Jacobe Smith has looked like a monster in all 12 of his professional fights.
items.quote: undefeated Jacare Souza who's looked like a monster in all 12 of his pro fights.
